3206730.name: Arraywrap
3206730.description:
Arraywrap is a puzzle game where numbers can bend space and distort reality. If the goal is out of reach, change the geometry of the world to open a new path. You will need to reason across different shapes of each level to make your way forward.

The game is very cryptic. Nothing is explained. You will have to experiment to gain understanding. There are many mysteries that I haven't solved myself yet. The Sky Archipelago is much bigger than it seems at first, with secrets scattered throughout. 

A nostalgic, retro aesthetic is used for the game's visuals, with an eerie and atmospheric soundtrack. The world is abandoned, and its rooms are strangely familiar, but empty. You're left all alone, floating in the sky. 

Every copy of Arraywrap is personalised.

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
